reviews.review_msg: Ferguson is a great lecturer. Very informant, passionate and clear and I really appreciate how she includes all students in discussions. However, as other reviews have said.. she is such a hard marker on essays! I am typically an A average student but struggled to maintain that. I encourage you take her class if interested in the topic but be aware

Such a hard marker. I typically get A's on my papers and I'm confident in the way I write. She has a very strict writing style and seems to be very bias. She is a wonderful person, but her grading is very difficult. I took this class as an elective and regret it.
